text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
My dorm held a pillow fight tournament last
night...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But I conked out at some point. When I woke up,
I was back in my room.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I wonder which team won in the end?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I think I'll ask the others for the deets. I should prolly ask when the next one is, too, while I'm at it... Yaaawn...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer looks both excited and sleepy at
the same time.
